updates.title: Airworthiness Directives; Pilatus Aircraft Ltd. Airplanes
updates.summary: The FAA proposes to adopt a new airworthiness directive (AD) for certain Pilatus Aircraft Ltd. (Pilatus) Model PC-24 airplanes. This proposed AD was prompted by a report that a solid-state relay (SSR) used in the left-hand (LH) windshield heating system may allow reverse current flow when in the OFF position. This proposed AD would require modification of the airplane and replacement of the affected SSR with a servic

updates.title: Extension of Import Restrictions Imposed on Categories of Archaeological and Ethnological Material of Türkiye
updates.summary: This document amends U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) regulations to reflect an extension of import restrictions on certain categories of archaeological and ethnological material of the Republic of T[uuml]rkiye (T[uuml]rkiye), which were originally imposed by CBP Decision Number 21-09. The CBP regulations are being amended to reflect this extension through March 24, 2031.

updates.title: Airworthiness Directives; Diamond Aircraft Industries Inc. Airplanes
updates.summary: The FAA proposes to adopt a new airworthiness directive (AD) for all Diamond Aircraft Industries Inc. (DAI) Model DA 40, DA 40 F, and DA 40 NG airplanes. This proposed AD was prompted by several reports of passenger door separation during flight. This proposed AD would require revising the existing airplane flight manual (AFM) to provide the flight crew with revised operating limitations, emergency procedures, and no

updates.title: Information Collections Being Reviewed by the Federal Communications Commission
updates.summary: As part of its continuing effort to reduce paperwork burdens, and as required by the Paperwork Reduction Act (PRA) of 1995, the Federal Communications Commission (FCC or the Commission) invites the general public and other Federal agencies to take this opportunity to comment on the following information collection. updates.title: Agency Information Collection Request. 30-Day Public Comment Request

updates.title: Schedules of Controlled Substances: Placement of CUMYL-PEGACLONE in Schedule I
updates.summary: With the issuance of this final rule, the Drug Enforcement Administration places 5-pentyl-2-(2-phenylpropan-2-yl)pyrido[4,3- b]indol-1-one (other names: CUMYL-PEGACLONE; SGT-151), including its salts, isomers, and salts of isomers whenever the existence of such salts, isomers, and salts of isomers is possible, in schedule I of the Controlled Substances Act. updates.title: Modernizing Spectrum Sharing for Satellite Broadband
updates.summary: In this document, the Federal Communications Commission (Commission or we) adopts a Report and Order (Order) that revises the spectrum sharing framework for Geostationary Orbit (GSO) and Non- Geostationary Orbit (NGSO) systems that currently relies on NGSO systems complying with Equivalent Power Flux Density (EPFD) limits developed in the late-1990s. updates.title: National Register of Historic Places; Notification of Pending Nominations and Related Actions
updates.summary: The National Park Service is soliciting electronic comments on the significance of properties nominated before May 2, 2026, for listing or related actions in the National Register of Historic Places.

updates.title: Competition Announcement; Comprehensive Centers
updates.summary: The Department of Education (ED) announces the opportunity to apply for competitive grants for the Fiscal Year (FY) 2026 under the Comprehensive Centers program, Assistance Listing Numbers (ALNs) 84.283B and 84.283D.

updates.title: Arts Advisory Panel Meetings
updates.summary: Pursuant to the Federal Advisory Committee Act, as amended, notice is hereby given that 24 meetings of the Arts Advisory Panel to the National Council on the Arts will be held by teleconference or videoconference.

updates.title: Notice of Funding Opportunity for the Community Connect Grant Program for Fiscal Year 2026
updates.summary: The Rural Utilities Service (RUS or the Agency), a Rural Development (RD) agency of the United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) is issuing a Notice of Funding Opportunity (NOFO) to announce acceptance of applications under the Community Connect Grant Program (CCG) for fiscal year (FY) 2026. updates.title: Service Performance Reporting Requirements; Revisions
updates.summary: The Commission is adopting final rule revisions that update the existing annual service performance reporting requirements for the Postal Service's Market Dominant products.
